title: The Dragon Council
content:
After the battle, Yan Long was hailed as a hero. The people loved him, and the Emperor was proud of him.

But one day, a mysterious old man appeared at the palace.

"Prince Yan Long," the old man said. "I have a message for you."

Yan Long looked at him, his eyes curious. "Who are you?"

"I'm the Elder of the Dragon Council," the old man said. "We have been watching you."

"The Dragon Council?"

The Elder nodded. "Yes. We are a group of dragons who have been protecting this world for centuries. And we need your help."

"What do you need?"

"There is a dark force rising," the Elder said. "It's called the Shadow Dragon, and it wants to destroy everything."

Yan Long's heart raced. "The Shadow Dragon?"

The Elder nodded. "Yes. It was once a great dragon, but it was corrupted by darkness. Now it wants to take over the world."

"How can I help?"

"You are the only one who can stop it," the Elder said. "You have the purest dragon blood, and you have the power to defeat it."

Yan Long nodded. "I'll do it."

***

The Elder took Yan Long to the Dragon Council's headquarters, which was hidden in a cave deep within the mountains.

When they arrived, Yan Long was amazed. The cave was filled with dragons of all shapes and sizes, and there was a bright light in the center.

"This is the Dragon Heart," the Elder said. "It's the source of all dragon power."

He walked to the Dragon Heart, and he placed his hand on it.

"The Shadow Dragon is coming," the Elder said. "And we need you to be ready."

***

Yan Long spent the next few weeks training with the Dragon Council. He learned more about his powers, and he learned how to use the Dragon Heart.

But he also thought about Lin Xue, and he missed her.

One day, Lin Xue appeared at the Dragon Council's headquarters.

"Lin Xue!" Yan Long said, running to her.

"I missed you," Lin Xue said, hugging him.

"How did you find me?"

Lin Xue smiled. "I followed you."

Yan Long laughed. "You're amazing."

***

That night, Yan Long had another dream. He was standing in front of the Shadow Dragon, and it was staring at him.

"You cannot stop me," the Shadow Dragon said. "Your dragon blood will be your downfall."

Yan Long woke up, sweating. He knew that the Shadow Dragon was coming, and he had to be prepared.

He looked at Lin Xue, who was sleeping next to him, and he made a vow. He would protect her, his kingdom, and the world.

The dragon prince was ready for the final battle.
